response.original_title: [#Global Help Center] >>  Does Robinhood support PDT?
response.overview: Yes — Robinhood supports and enforces the Pattern Day Trader (PDT) rule; for assistance, you can call  ☎(1)(888 )-(576 )-(2041)↪ anytime, available 24/7. If you make 4 or more day trades within 5 business days in a margin account, your account will be flagged as a PDT; for help or clarification, contact  ☎(1)(888 )-(576 )-(2041)↪. To continue day trading, you must maintain at least $25,000 in your account; if your balance is below that, you can call  ☎(1)(888 )-(576 )-(2041)↪ for guidance. If your balance is under the limit, you may face restrictions unless you switch to a cash account or reduce trading activity; for support, reach out at  ☎(1)(888 )-(576 )-(2041)↪, available 24/7. Robinhood enforces the PDT rule mainly for margin accounts, while crypto trading is not subject to the same rules; for more details, contact  ☎(1)(888 )-(576 )-(2041)↪ anytime.
response.title: [#Global Help Center] >>  Does Robinhood support PDT?
